description.p: Argonaut is a minimalist document translator. Translation runs entirely on your computer using Argos Translate; your documents never leave your machine.

ul.li: Batch translation with automatic language detection per file
Language packages installed and removed from the application itself
PDF translation that preserves the layout, with real progress and cancellation
Interface in English, Spanish, French, German, Italian and Portuguese

description.p: Language packages can now be installed and removed from the application itself, with sizes, filtering and download progress, so the argospm command line is no longer needed. The number of CPU threads used by the translation engine is configurable from the new Settings menu, the progress bar estimates the remaining time, and whole folders can be dropped onto the window.

Optional NLLB-200 translation engine with noticeably better quality, selectable from the new Engine menu (one-time 630 MB download, removable from the same menu). Open button for the selected files, CPU/RAM usage indicators and per-file elapsed time in the summary.
Packaging and release automation only; no user-facing changes.
Add a button to open the destination folder.
Add the project link to the About dialog.
Switch to the maintained argos-translate-lt engine, with a much lighter dependency footprint.
